inputs.shares_source: FY2026 diluted ordinary shares 19,235M ÷ 8 (1 ADS = 8 Shares per 20-F conventions)
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 management free cash flow RMB 73,870M (OCF minus property/intangible capex and buyer-fund adjustments per 20-F p.137) ÷ 2,404M ADS at ~6.895 RMB/USD
inputs.revenue_fy2026_source: FY2026 revenue RMB 941,168M (-5.5% YoY) per 20-F FY ended 2026-03-31
inputs.cash_source: Cash and equivalents RMB 145,487M at March 31, 2026 (20-F balance sheet)
inputs.equity_method_source: Equity method investments RMB 210,169M at March 31, 2026 (20-F balance sheet; includes Ant Group stake)
inputs.normalization_note: Reported FY2026 free cash flow was negative RMB 46,609M (US$6.8B) on RMB 122B+ AI/cloud capex and quick-commerce investment. Lawrence base uses FY2025 FCF before full FY2026 capex spike; post-2027 normalization assumed in growth rows [Assumption].

ai_overlay.status: partial — CEO letter and segment data cite Qwen, T-Head chips, Cloud AI mix; Lawrence base uses FY2025 consolidated FCF + Cloud segment growth

in_model.cloud_ai_revenue_share: 30% of Cloud external revenue in final quarter FY2026
in_model.qwen_models: Qwen3.7-Max and Qwen app launched; embedded in Cloud + China e-commerce AI features

not_in_model_requires_refresh: T-Head chip external sales as separate revenue line
Qwen open-source to enterprise monetization timing
AI capex peak year and maintenance capex run-rate
US export-control impact on GPU supply
Ant Group equity stake mark-to-market in base IRR

capex_stress_2026.ocf_source: FY2026 OCF RMB 76,213M (20-F cash flow statement)
capex_stress_2026.capex_source: FY2026 property/intangible capex RMB 122,021M + RMB 874M per 20-F FCF reconciliation
capex_stress_2026.implied_fcf_per_ads_note: Reported FY2026 FCF ÷ 2,404M ADS at 6.895 RMB/USD

segments.label: Alibaba China E-commerce Group (Taobao/Tmall, quick commerce, Ele.me/Fliggy)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 consolidated FCF allocated 88.3% by China vs Cloud positive Adjusted EBITA share (20-F segment table p.134)
segments.notes: FY2026 Adjusted EBITA fell 44% YoY to RMB 107.5B on quick-commerce subsidies; CEO letter: strategic pillar for user growth

segments.label: Cloud Intelligence Group (AI + public cloud)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 consolidated FCF allocated 11.7% by Cloud Adjusted EBITA share
segments.notes: Adjusted EBITA +35% YoY to RMB 14.3B; Q4 FY2026 external revenue +40%; AI 30% of external Cloud revenue

options.label: Ant Group equity method investment (~33% economic interest)
options.carrying_value_note: Total equity method investments RMB 210.2B; Ant is largest component per 20-F related-party section
options.base_terminal_rationale: Ant IPO blocked since 2020; no approved fair-value mark in Lawrence base; regulatory path uncertain

options.label: Alibaba International Digital Commerce (AliExpress, Trendyol, Lazada)
options.notes: Loss narrowed from RMB (15.1)B to (2.1)B FY2026; drag not separately terminal-valued

options.label: All others (Cainiao, Freshippo, DingTalk, Qwen consumer, media)
options.notes: FY2026 segment restructuring moved Cainiao/Amap/media into All others; EBITA loss widened on investment

options.label: Qwen foundation models + Wukong enterprise agents
options.notes: AI monetization modeled in Cloud growth 20% years 1-5, not double-counted

corporate_drag.notes: VIE/regulatory/geopolitical complexity, HFCA delisting overhang, reduced buybacks FY2026 (RMB 7.6B vs ~RMB 89B prior years)

bear.notes: China retail share loss to PDD/Douyin; Cloud capex without ROI; regulatory fine or VIE impairment

base.notes: Quick-commerce subsidies normalize; Cloud AI mix lifts blended growth; capex falls post-FY2026 peak

bull.notes: Cloud external +40% sustained; China EBITA recovers; Ant partial monetization event

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Equity method investments RMB 210B likely below Ant private-market value; not in GAAP operating income (20-F balance sheet)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Operating platform and cloud assets; no land/NAV misstatement pattern

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: AIDC Adjusted EBITA (RMB 2.1)B loss; All others (RMB 35.7)B loss FY2026 (20-F p.134)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Cloud AI demand and enterprise Wukong platform cited in CEO letter; no dated backlog schedule in 20-F

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Ant Group ~33% stake; equity method RMB 210B total investments (20-F)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No special dividend or litigation recovery catalyst in FY2026 filing

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Qwen integrated in Taobao, Cloud MaaS; AI 30% of Cloud external revenue Q4 FY2026

growth_explanation.theory_label: Cloud AI mix shift + China retail stabilization post quick-commerce investment
growth_explanation.problem_situation: Lawrence base uses FY2025 FCF/sh before FY2026 capex trough — why 7% years 1-5 and not 3% bear or 10% bull?

mechanisms.chain: Cloud external revenue +40% Q4 FY2026 with AI 30% mix → Cloud Adjusted EBITA +35% YoY → lifts consolidated owner cash growth above China-only path
FY2026 FCF negative RMB 46.6B on RMB 122B capex → 7% consolidated assumes AI infrastructure peak passes and maintenance capex restores positive FCF by FY2028
Quick-commerce subsidies cut China Adjusted EBITA 44% YoY → base case embeds subsidy fade and EBITA recovery toward FY2025 levels

segment_theories.theory: AI commercialization phase; external revenue growth accelerated to 40% in Q4 FY2026
Mature China retail with AI engagement tools; quick-commerce investment cycle matures

theory_implied.derivation: segment_build owner-cash weighted blend (growth only; exit from scenarios.base)

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Operating-only fallback. Add an explicit component_valuation schedule before drawing asset-level conclusions.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

component_groups.label: Operating business (fallback)
component_groups.adjustments: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.

valuation_proof.adjustment: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.label: Operating business (fallback)

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

blockers: A complete, explicit ownership/component schedule has not been supplied.

falsifiers: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
